description: FX-8200, HR=167 (marked tachycardia), wide QRS=148ms, prolonged QTcB=533. Likely SVT-with-aberrancy or VT — PR unmeasurable on the printout (shown as ****).
_notes: Truth values transcribed from machine printout (varied_HR167_reference.jpg). PR=null because the machine could not measure it. Beat=15, '#Unconfirmed report#'. Wide-QRS tachycardia is a stress test for the DWT delineator — wider tolerances reflect that.
